{{CargoRelic
|name=Murder On The Train
|class_id=22068
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-01
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Jan 1, 1934 AD, Murder on the Train was first published.<br>Murder On The Train is a renowned detective fiction story. It involves a murder case on a train and follows a detective's investigation of twelve suspects using complex clues to find the true killer. The book introduced a new style to detective novels, significantly influencing later literary works of the same genre.
|fame=32
|art=27
|fth=26
|civ=48
|tech=21
|ss1=Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss2=Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +6<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss3=Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +9<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss4=Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +15<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss7=Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +15<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +20
}}
